title: A CS Professor on Why Slow Learning Wins in the AI Era | CU Boulder, Tom Yeh
summary: Tom Yeh argues that teaching AI through manual, slow learning of mathematical foundations is more resilient than training on current tools. He contends that building conceptual understanding at human speed creates skills that survive technological cycles and that people must actively shape AI rather than passively adopt it.
